seedanceSegments.title: Lamination fold hook
seedanceSegments.description: Butter lock, feuilletage folds, triangle cut, raw crescent spiral.
seedanceSegments.continuity: Opening texture-first; scene 2 pays off visible strata from scene 1.
seedanceSegments.risk: Seedance may smooth lamination into one dough mass; LaminatedDoughLayersFrame mandatory.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: dry fold; butter tap; roll ridges; soft dough roll

seedanceSegments.title: Bake golden croissants
seedanceSegments.description: Egg wash, oven slide, hard cut raw to baked, flake pull, syrup gloss.
seedanceSegments.continuity: Croissant length 14-16 cm locked from segment 01 spiral.
seedanceSegments.risk: Morphing raw-to-baked or brioche-smooth surface; state refs required.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: oven warmth; crust crackle; syrup brush

seedanceSegments.title: Cookie dough mix and chill
seedanceSegments.description: Melted butter, mix, chips, chilled dough balls.
seedanceSegments.continuity: Cookie balls 3.5-4 cm for assembly segment 04.
seedanceSegments.risk: Liquid batter instead of firm chill; CookieDoughBallsFrame required.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: butter pour; whisk; chip clatter; bowl tap

seedanceSegments.title: Fill and stage crookies
seedanceSegments.description: Hinge cut, cookie fill inside and out, topping, pre-bake tray.
seedanceSegments.continuity: Same 14-16 cm croissant shell; pre-bake state flows to segment 05.
seedanceSegments.risk: Cookie slides off or croissant separates; hinge must stay intact.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: knife crust; dough press; pecan crack

seedanceSegments.title: Bake and gooey reveal
seedanceSegments.description: Second bake, steam, controlled break showing molten cookie center.
seedanceSegments.continuity: Destructive reveal here only; segment 06 returns to intact hero.
seedanceSegments.risk: Model may break hero crookies in later segment if break too prominent; isolate to this segment.

seedanceSegments.title: Hero lock intact crookies
seedanceSegments.description: Intact golden crookies on rack and island; character satisfied; motionless outro handoff.
seedanceSegments.continuity: Matches FinalDishVisual exactly for licorn_celebration_outro; no break or touch.
seedanceSegments.risk: Accidental slice or bite on hero; restate intact lock in negatives.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: quiet kitchen; subtle crust tap; satisfied exhale

seedanceSegments.title: Licorn celebration outro
seedanceSegments.description: App-injected standardized Licorn celebration; dish from FinalDishVisual.
